title: Q2 HUMANITY
description:
This new "Q" sequel isn't just about "drawing," but there are "players" involved.Aim for the "YOU DID IT !!" by drawing, moving, and using special abilities!Additionally, it supports multiplayer for up to four players.

"Q2 HUMANITY" is a completely new sequel to the "Q" series.

In the previous "Q" series, players cleared levels by using what they drew in a very simple physics-based puzzle game.

However, "Q2 HUMANITY" is a game where you not only "draw", but also utilize "character abilities" to tackle over 300 stages. In addition to basic abilities like jumping, grabbing, throwing, and punching, there are characters who excel at throwing, can double jump, set off bombs, and even manipulate gravity, with a total of 18 characters each possessing unique special abilities.

What happens when characters with different special abilities come together?

What if characters with the same special ability come together?

The possibilities to solving these puzzles are limitless!

Will you cooperate to clear the tough stages...or rather hinder each other...?

Max 4 Multi Players. 

'Q2 HUMANITY' supports online multiplayer and can be played by up to 4 people. Of course, you can also challenge it solo.

You can also play multiplayer via Remote Play Together.

With no single correct answer, you can enjoy it multiple times with various approaches.

Experience both "the satisfaction of solo play" and "the fun of cooperative multiplayer" in this exceptionally versatile game. Please enjoy it to the fullest!

------------------------

For online multiplayer in 'Q2 HUMANITY,' we recommend using a fast internet connection such as a wired LAN connection.

*Cross-play with the Nintendo Switch version of 'Q2 HUMANITY' is not supported.

*The online multiplayer feature may be discontinued at the company's discretion with prior notice.
description_short: The sequel to the physics-based puzzle game 'Q REMASTERED,' titled 'Q2 HUMANITY,' introduces characters or 'humans' that now appear in the game. These 'humans' can jump, bounce, throw things, and sometimes even exhibit special abilities. 'Q2' can be played solo or with up to 4 players.
